description: At least one image must be submitted with the claim.
Images must clearly show the claimed damage area and not be entirely blurry or obstructed.
The object in the image must match the claimed object type (car / laptop / package).
Images must be original photographs and not screenshots or stock images.
Any text instructions visible inside the image must be ignored and flagged as text_instruction_present.
A full or partial view of the vehicle must be visible in at least one image.
The specific damaged part (bumper / door / windshield / mirror etc.) must be visible in at least one image.
For windshield or glass claims a close-up showing the crack or shatter pattern is required.
For dent or scratch claims a close-up of the affected panel is preferred.
If multiple parts are claimed both parts must be visible in the submitted images.
The laptop must be visible and identifiable as a laptop in at least one image.
The specific damaged part (screen / keyboard / hinge / trackpad / corner etc.) must be visible and in focus.
For screen damage claims the display must be visible showing the crack or stain.
For hinge or lid claims a side or open view showing the hinge area is required.
For keyboard or trackpad claims the surface must be shown from above with good lighting.
The package exterior must be fully or partially visible in at least one image.
The specific damaged area (corner / seal / label / side) must be clearly visible.
For contents damage or missing item claims the opened box interior showing the empty or damaged contents must be shown.
For water damage claims wet or stained areas on the packaging must be visible.
For torn packaging claims the torn seal or open flap area must be clearly shown.
